task: Plan a small retry-and-reflection agent run inspired by Reflexion for a new PaperToSkill task while preserving memory and failure-learning constraints.
user_prompt: Given a small task where an agent may fail on the first attempt, produce an agent run plan that follows the Reflexion method closely enough to be executable in a local harness. The plan must include actor/evaluator/self-reflection roles, short-term trajectory memory, long-term reflection memory, feedback sources, retry policy, validation metrics, and limitations.

required_capabilities.description: Plan preserves Actor, Evaluator, and Self-Reflection roles.
Plan converts feedback into verbal self-reflection rather than weight updates.
Plan distinguishes short-term trajectory memory from long-term reflection memory.
Plan includes iterative trials until an evaluator marks success or a stop rule triggers.
Plan remembers the evaluated task families and reported improvements.
Plan preserves limitations and stop conditions.
Context includes source anchors or equivalent traceability.
